name: tech-titan
description: Tech-Titan PC Builder — Monorepo (capa-datos / capa-negocio / capa-presentacion)

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n "  DB ,  API, APP " -c "bgCyan.black,bgGreen.black,bgMagenta.white" "npm run dev:db" "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:app"
scripts.dev:db: docker compose -f capa-datos/docker-compose.yml --project-name tech-titan up -d && wait-on tcp:localhost:5433 tcp:localhost:6379 --timeout 30000 --interval 1000 && echo [DB] PostgreSQL y Redis listos
scripts.dev:api: wait-on tcp:localhost:5433 tcp:localhost:6379 --timeout 60000 --interval 1000 && npm --prefix capa-negocio run develop
scripts.dev:app: wait-on http-get://localhost:9000/health --timeout 120000 --interval 2000 --window 1000 && npm --prefix capa-presentacion run dev
scripts.stop: docker compose -f capa-datos/docker-compose.yml --project-name tech-titan stop && echo [DB] Contenedores detenidos
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.install:all: npm --prefix capa-negocio install && npm --prefix capa-presentacion install
